mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_action (user_id, target_id, action_type, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetId}, #{actionType}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT target_id FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND action_type = 2 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_action WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND action_type = 2
